case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP., vs. PETTWAY, DEAYNE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT PETTWAY, DEAYNE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PETTWAY, DEAYNE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT PETTWAY, DEAYNE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT PETTWAY, DEAYNE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PETTWAY, DEAYNE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT PETTWAY, DEAYNE

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-26-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-02-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETTWAY, DEAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 391 LEAVENWORTH STREET UNIT NO. #6 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-16-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.

3:00 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. JACQUIE HANSEN APPEARED WITH PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, GREER M. SMITH AND LELA HARRIS. DEFENDANT DWAYNE PETTWAY APPEARED IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 391 LEAVENWORTH STREET #6 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 5:00 P.M. ON 11/16/93. PRIOR POSTING OF WRIT PERMITTED. ADDITIONALLY, PLTF. TO HAVE MONEY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. DWAYNE PETTWAY FOR $1,000.00. PLTF. DOES NOT ADMIT THAT A GREATER SUM IS NOT DUE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISE A AFTER 11/16/93 BY DEFENDANT IS DEEMED ABANDONED AND BECOMES THE PROPERTY OF PLAINTIFF TO DISPOSE OF AS HE SEES FIT. DEFEDNATS SECURITY DEPOSIT IN THE SUM OF $250.00 IS TO BE CREDITED TO RENT DUE OR TO ANY DAMAGES TO THE APARTMENT BEYOND NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETTWAY, DEAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 391 LEAVENWORTH STREET UNIT NO. #6 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-16-1993, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $7.40 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
